mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recordings
WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recordings (id, rule_id, environment_id, agent_id, agent_ip, protocol, host, port, service_name, method, path, request_headers_json, request_body, response_status_code, response_headers_json, response_body, response_time_ms, recorded_at, tags_json) VALUES (#{id}, #{ruleId}, #{environmentId}, #{agentId}, #{agentIp}, #{protocol}, #{host}, #{port}, #{serviceName}, #{method}, #{path}, #{requestHeaders, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{requestBody}, #{responseStatusCode}, #{responseHeaders, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{responseBody}, #{responseTimeMs}, #{recordedAt}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM recordings WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM recordings ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT #{keepCount})
DELETE FROM recordings WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM recordings ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT #{keepCount})
